slides.title: Your metabolism isn't *broken*.
slides.sub: The thing people call a 'slow metabolism' is almost always something quieter — and fixable.

slides.title: Your NEAT crashed
slides.body: When you eat less, your body unconsciously moves less — fewer steps, less fidgeting. This 'NEAT' can quietly swing *200–400 calories a day*.

slides.title: Less food, less movement
slides.body: Crash diets make it worse: you slash food, your body slashes movement to match, and the scale *stops moving while you're starving*.

slides.title: Muscle sets your floor
slides.body: Muscle is metabolically active tissue. Lose it and your resting burn drops. *Keeping muscle* protects your metabolism for life.

slides.title: You're eating more than you think
slides.body: Most people underestimate intake by *hundreds of calories* — bites, oils, drinks. It feels like slow metabolism; it's untracked food.

slides.title: Move more, eat enough
slides.body: Hit a step target, lift to keep muscle, and *don't crash your calories*. That restores the burn far better than another cleanse.

slides.title: Your metabolism, *back online*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your steps, food and weight trend together — so you can see your NEAT and intake instead of guessing.

caption:
Almost nobody has a truly 'broken' metabolism. What they have is crashed NEAT — moving less without noticing — plus untracked food. 🔥

The fix isn't a cleanse. It's steps, enough protein, lifting to keep muscle, and not slashing calories to zero. 🔖

Vibe Health shows your steps, food and weight trend in one place → link in bio.
youtube_title: Your Metabolism Isn't Broken — Here's What Is
